reason: trial identity is ambiguous between two candidate definitions; per instructions, no immutable manifest is produced until this is resolved with certainty
one_raw_xdf_file: one participant-session's complete continuous multimodal recording (~1220s, all 4 streams), not a trial
one_preprocessed_hdf5_file: same scope as raw XDF - one participant-session's filtered continuous recording, not split per-stimulus
one_segment_file: one of 7 pre-defined slices per session: 1 neutral_baseline + 3 quadrant_* + 3 transition_*_period

segment_equals_stimulus_presentation.note: transition segments are the inter-stimulus interval, not a presentation themselves

unique_stimulus_identifier: video_name (19 distinct videos in video_mappings table, with emotion/quadrant/source/length_sec attributes)

onset_offset_reconstructable_without_gue.exception: last video in a session's timeline: end_time computed as start_time + video_mappings.length_sec (approximation), not a stored ground-truth LEAD() value
onset_offset_reconstructable_without_gue.observed_in_practice: all 233 trusted inspected segment files had explicit non-null start_time/end_time/duration attrs

verified_via: official code comment + expected_files formula in 07_run_segmentation.py
actual archive listing (238 files under segments/)
database journey table (136 rows) + 34x3=102 derivable transitions = 238

segments_independent_trials_or_derived_w: neither simply - 136 are stimulus-presentation segments (matching journey table), 102 are derived transition segments (computed from consecutive journey rows, not first-class DB rows); none are statistically independent within a session
rule_5_compliance_note: neither 136 nor 238 should be treated as i.i.d. sample size; true independence unit is at most 34 participant-sessions, arguably 28 participants
open_unresolved_items: 136 vs 238 as the definitive trial count - a modeling-design decision, not resolved here
69s (paper) vs 123-143s/~133s (code validation) vs ~133.0s (observed in real segments) - three different transition/reset duration figures, not reconciled
ECG/GSR channel-order discrepancy (see dejavu_identity_conflict_audit.json incidental_finding) - unresolved, affects modality data trustworthiness
39 truncated HDF5 files not content-inspected; their internal structure is assumed by analogy to the 269 trusted files, not verified
